rulings.Case Title: ALLYSYN OVERTON VS. PATRICK LAKE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 24, 2014, Line 3: CROSS-DEFENDANT ALLYSYN OVERTON'S MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT: GRANTED. Cross-Complainant's TACC is stricken. Cross-Complainant shall file an amended cross-complaint for breach of 2011 Lease only no later than December 1, 2014 by 4:00 p.m. Motion to seal is granted. Cross-Complainant shall prepare a copy of August 26, 2014 opposition with exhibits under seal and submit it to the Record's Department no later that December 1, 2014 by 4:00 p.m. Request for sanctions is denied. Prevailing party prepare order. (501/REQ)
